# Additional Resources

## ggdibbler

Ggdibbler is an R package that allows you to create graphics using uncertainty variables. We used this package in demonstrating the variability of each treatment in the [graphic section](#sec-graph) This resource has access to other functions that would help you implement variability in many different graphs. @mason2025

## distributional

Distributional is an R package that allows you to put distributions in cells of vector. This package was used in tandem with ggdibbler and it is the foundation of ggdibbler. This resource has access to many functions to support ggdibbler graphs. @ohara-wild2026
